description_long: This lamppost features an ornate, classical design with a tall, slender pole supporting a multi-tiered structure. The upper section includes two prominent, gold-colored circular lamp heads, each flanked by intricate, winged decorative elements reminiscent of Art Nouveau or Victorian styles. Above the lamps, a blue rectangular element sits horizontally, possibly serving as a decorative or functional housing. The central shaft is adorned with additional blue and silver embellishments, and the base is flared for stability. The overall construction suggests a blend of metalwork and painted surfaces, with a focus on both illumination and aesthetic appeal.
description: An ornate, classical lamppost with gold circular lamp heads, blue decorative panels, and intricate silver embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of gold lamp heads, blue panels, and winged silver decorations.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the lamppost and the stacked arrangement of the lamp heads and blue panels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the blue panel and the mirrored decorative elements, with lamp heads visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the vertical alignment and layered structure of the lamppost.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Twin gold circular lamp heads with a shallow dome profile, flanked by ornate winged motifs.

license_info.creator_display_name: พระมหาเจดีย์ศรีแสงธรรมวิสุทธิมงคล
